name: build-second-brain
description: Two skills by Amritpal Singh Boparai: Build Second Brain (git repo analysis + knowledge base + Claude memory injection) and SaaS Architect (enterprise multi-tenant backend design with NestJS + Drizzle + PostgreSQL).

plugins.name: build-second-brain
plugins.description: Two powerful skills: (1) Build Second Brain — mine git repos with parallel agents to extract engineering patterns into a structured knowledge base with Claude memory injection. (2) SaaS Architect — enterprise multi-tenant backend architect for NestJS + Drizzle ORM + PostgreSQL + TimescaleDB + BullMQ + Redis.
